name: Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin)
deficiency_symptoms: fatigue,mouth sores,cracked lips,eye problems,skin issues,anemia,cognitive impairment
supplementation_notes: Take with food; activated form is preferred

name: Pantothenic Acid (B5)
supplementation_notes: Found in all foods; deficiency rare

name: Vitamin K
deficiency_symptoms: excessive bleeding,easy bruising,poor bone healing,osteoporosis,cardiovascular issues
supplementation_notes: Split K1 and K2; MK4 vs MK7 differences

name: Potassium
supplementation_notes: Risk of hyperkalemia with supplements; food preferred

name: Sodium
food_sources: table salt 1 tsp=2300mg,soy sauce 1 tbsp=1000mg,canned goods vary,processed foods high
supplementation_notes: Excessive intake worsens hypertension; usually excess

name: Chloride
food_sources: table salt 1 tsp=3500mg,seaweed varies,processed foods,dairy products

name: Iodine
food_sources: seaweed varies widely,sea salt 1 tsp=0-50mcg,iodized salt 1 tsp=77mcg,eggs 2 large=25mcg,dairy 1 cup=50mcg

name: Manganese
deficiency_symptoms: poor growth,weak bones,skin rashes,mood changes,reproductive issues

name: Molybdenum
supplementation_notes: Deficiency extremely rare; dietary sources sufficient

name: Vanadium
deficiency_symptoms: impaired glucose metabolism,altered lipid profiles,potential growth effects

name: Boron
deficiency_symptoms: hormonal imbalances,poor bone health,cognitive issues,arthritis-like symptoms

name: Nickel
supplementation_notes: May trigger contact dermatitis in sensitive individuals

name: Lithium
food_sources: trace in foods; supplements used clinically

name: Strontium
supplementation_notes: May help bone mineral density; controversial
